## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case that the current API
does not cover.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you have an API
shape in mind, sketch it here:

```ts
// proposed usage
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried or considered.

## Additional context

Links to the relevant PDFium feature/API, related issues, or anything else that
helps.
